entity.name: MAGA Tech-Skeptic Faction
entity.description: Republican legislators hostile to Big Tech "censorship" and friendly to industrial-policy / China-hawk framings. Skeptical of NIST AISI as a vehicle for "woke AI." Often aligned with Heritage / Project 2025 priorities. Loose, not a formal caucus.

activity.title: Bipartisan Senators Push for Better Federal Data on AI's Impact on U.S. Workforce
activity.raw_text: Mark R. Warner (D-VA) and Josh Hawley (R-MO) today led a bipartisan group of senators in urging the U.S. Department of Labor, Bureau of Labor Statistics, and Census Bureau to expand data collection and public reporting on the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the U.S. workforce. As AI technologies are rapidly developed, deployed, and integrated across industries, the senators warned that policymakers and researchers will increasingly need reliable federal data to understand how these changes are reshaping the labor market.

_verify_phrases: expand data collection and public reporting on the impact

activity.title: Hawley, Blumenthal Introduce Bill to Prevent Data Centers from Increasing Electricity Costs for Americans
activity.raw_text: WASHINGTON — Today, U.S. Senators Josh Hawley (R-Mo.) and Senator Richard Blumenthal (D-Ct.) introduced the Guaranteeing Rate Insulation from Data Centers (GRID) Act to stop data centers from driving up energy costs. Over the last several years, data center construction has taken off, creating enormous strains on our energy infrastructure. And this AI-fueled boom shows no signs of slowing down—in fact, data centers' demand for power is expected to double over the next four years.

_verify_phrases: Guaranteeing Rate Insulation from Data Centers
